qa_pairs.question: How should I request cloud resources if I require them in more than one location?
qa_pairs.answer: If you need to request cloud resources in more than one location, you will have to make one separate request for each location on the CCDB portal.

qa_pairs.question: What types of Virtual Machines (VMs) can be selected on the Arbutus, Fir, Béluga, and Nibi clouds?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can select both compute or persistent Virtual Machines (VMs) on the Arbutus, Fir, and Béluga clouds. However, on the Nibi cloud, only persistent VMs are available for selection.
